SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-11-2019 - JUDGMENT.
TRIAL RESET TO DEC-11-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF OCT-16-2019 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DAZA-QUIROZ, OMAR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT STEVENSON, DEMARKUS $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $30.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,030.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $12.98 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT STEVENSON, DEMARKUS
TRIAL RESET TO OCT-16-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF AUG-26-2019 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-11-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-11-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF OMAR DAZA-QUIROZ IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT DEMARKUS STEVENSON IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT STEVENSON, DEMARKUS
